mentions.note: Fast-casual restaurant chain; customer experience strong (fresh food, good value); Cramer bullish on next-Chipotle potential; hold and buy on pullbacks.
Fresh food, good value fast-casual; could be next Chipotle; hold and buy more on pullbacks.
Up 40% YTD from January book recommendation; down 3 today but Cramer likes fundamentals; wait for $73–75 pullback before entry.
Fast casual restaurant stock; making big move just starting; in same rally group as Yum and Texas Roadhouse; good buy.
Fast-casual restaurant packed with young, health-conscious, value-seeking diners. Best-of-breed new concept; clean, tasty, fun; appeals across age groups.
